reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Nice college with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Last year lots of companies visited here and so many students gets placed in different companies. In this year also some companies visited till date. Almost about 40% of students gets placed every year. The highest salary offered was 12 Lacs and the lowest 1.5 Lacs. The companies like Amazon, ICICI, janpact and lots more visited here. The roles like junior engineer, manager etc. Were offered to different students. The college has recently joined an internship programme with internshala. The college has its own placement cell which helps students to get their job.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: Average college in Jodhpur area.

review_content.Placements: During our final year 5-7 Companies came for campus recruitment. But, most of them offered salary less than what they quoted before placement. I was selected in 2 companies, but joined None of them, as they offered non technical job profile. I have been in touch with my juniors and they informed me that placement situation is still not good. On an average placement ratio is 20%. .
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, laboratories, workshops are just fine. They are neither good nor bad. Library is well organized and good place to read books. There is no Wi-Fi available for students. Canteen is the best place in whole campus to hangout as they don't have big grounds. Sports activities are held annually but on very small scale. Hostel rooms are okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: There are very much less chance of placements in civil engineering branch. There are chance in electrical and mechanical and computer Science streams. Good placement are provided with best companies. Mostly talented students are placed in good companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi campus and Labs with all instruments. Attractive classroom and Library with lots of best books. Hospital facility is provided. And sports activities are done. A good canteen is present here with reasonable price of all food content and all type of fast food is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best engineering colleges in Jodhpur.

review_content.Placements: Every year, there is placement drive in our college in which well-reputed companies come, and most of the students are placed. Top-ranked companies like Amazon, HCL, Tata, and TCS are recruiting students from last few years, and these students are getting a better pay scale.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has an amazing infrastructure with a number of buildings. There is good ventilation provided for classrooms as well as labs. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and sports activities are done from time to time so that the students get some refreshment from their busy schedule.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: A better place for pure study and a healthy environment for students.

review_content.Placements: Many local and some big companies come to the college for the betterment of students. Many of the students got selected because they have the better environment for the job which they got from the college. The companies which came every year are BHEL, Amazon, Paytm, Tata, Wipro, Reliance, JSW and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a sufficient campus area of 27 acres, which contains basketball ground, cricket ground, football ground, college canteen, hospital, 5 blocks and 4 hostels. The labs and the classrooms are also clean and neat in the college and have a better environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: There is really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 60 to 70 percent students were placed in good companies like Amazon, Paytm, Reliable Soft Tech Pvt Ltd Jodhpur, CG Technosoft, Dreamteam, Cube, Genpact, Skill Rock and other companies from Delhi, Pune, Jodhpur and Jaipur. College is nice in studies also. And at last, I am happy with my placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides very nice facilities. The college has a nice lab with good speed Wi-Fi connection. There are nice classrooms with the proper seating arrangement. Medical facilities are also there, and there are two playgrounds for sports activities. The hostel facility is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Best college I will ever see.
reviews.review_text: Well placed infrastructure with all the latest facilities like computer lab with the hi-speed Internet. All other labs with all necessary equipment that is used in the labs for study purpose are available. All are well maintained and works properly.

reviews.review_heading: The college has the good infrastructure, but they should focus more on the technical placements.
reviews.review_text: One of the best colleges in Jodhpur by its infrastructure with evergreen parks and trees. But if we discuss its hostel rooms, there was no Wi-Fi facility, but they have installed the Wi-Fi system before 2 years, but they never made it useful for the students. The classrooms were good but not too good as the seating arrangement was the worst. The library was well-maintained, but sometimes they face lack of books from a specified branch. The quality of food in a mess was not good. Only on the new ...

reviews.review_heading: I am not fully satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the college is good for engineering because in this college the labs are maintained and also have other facilities like Wi-Fi, library, etc. The classrooms are not in good condition because some chairs are broken. In the classrooms, we don't have projector facility, so for presentation, we go to seminar hall.

reviews.review_heading: I am not benefited from this college.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure was good. The college has very open space environment. The rooms, library, and labs were okay. The food in the canteen was not good. The hostel rooms were not good. There is no ground facility to play the games. There was no proper cleanliness,
 and it is very far from the city. The medical facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Career defining pace of my life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in my college is good. It includes fine chairs and good quality benches. Not only this, our chemistry lab has all types of chemicals required, but my favourite as a student of computer science department is computer lab which includes high RAM computer and in proper condition with the high-speed internet.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience and the knowledge.
reviews.review_text: This college provides the Wi-Fi facility, canteen, clean water, better electricity equipment like a fan, A/C, computers and internet. The canteen food is costly but good for health. We face an issue of long distance to city and no transportation facilities. The classrooms and the labs are good in condition and clean. The hostel is better to live, but the food and water are not clean and healthy. The sports and medical facilities are better on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best engineering college. You must take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: There are very good amenities in the college. High-tech labs are available. There is a very good environment, and a hygienic cafeteria. Transport facility was very good. There was safety for girls. Sports facilities are present. Extracurricular activities are active. There is an open theatre. There are hockey stadium, football stadium, cricket stadium. It is the best in terms of cultural and sports events.

reviews.review_heading: A review on the Vyas college of engineering. Is it good for you or not?
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. But the location of the campus is very bad. But overall, the infrastructure is good. The salary for the faculty is normal not so good, approximately 15k.

reviews.review_heading: Vcet best review from er. Nitesh gehlot
reviews.review_text: Vyas college is arranged WiFi campus in 2017 and provided only 10 mb per day per student. Classrooms are good , library are not superb but also good and medical facilities not available in campus it is good college, sports and games only available for hostels student

More than 380 students were placed from both JMIT and JMIETI during the 2022 campus placements. The highest package of INR 10.25 LPA was offered during the placements drive. Some of the companies that emerged as the top recruiters during the placements drive included Wipro, TCS and Bebo Technologies with 79, 40 and 34 placements, respectively. Other recruiting companies included Altudo, Nagarro, ADP Private Limited and Coforge Ltd., among others. Mukand Lal Institutions plans to achieve more than 1,000 placements in 2022, reported Dr Ramesh Kumar.

reviews.review_heading: Good education, good faculty, good placements every year, and nice facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facility is very good and cooperative in our course. They give us good Wi-Fi and well-maintained labs and classrooms. Library is very nice. All types of books are available in our college library. The food quality is good in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are okay.

reviews.review_heading: A beautiful college in healthy nature. Faculty members are our parents. Fests are amazing here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is provided here. Lab and classrooms are well-furnished and air-conditioned. Our campus has a beautiful area. The library is small. The quality of food is excellent, other than that medical, sports and games all facilities are provided with special timings. Food is just like home food.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not good. There is no separate department. Wi-Fi is outdated. The class is also not good. The library is of average type. Facilities of the hostel are good. If there is any complaint registered by the student, immediate action is taken on it. The quality of mess and canteen food is so cheap. The medical facility is not good because the medicine is not available on time. There is not a single sports facility in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good College with a really nice infrastructure and really nice teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, and labs are also there. The classrooms are smart, and the library is nice. Sports facilities are available, and the food in the canteen is of good quality. A dispensary is available on campus. The infrastructure of our college and hostel is good and classic. All the classes are smart and connected with Wi-Fi. The library has a variety of academic and social books. We can issue books for 2 weeks, after which we have to apply for reissue.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my degree. If anyone wants to study, they can study in any situation.
reviews.review_text: Our college and hostel have good and classic infrastructure. All classes are smart and connected with Wi-Fi. The library has a variety of books, both academic and general interest. We can issue books for two weeks, after which we have to apply for a re-issue.

reviews.review_heading: These college staff need money, not their students' bright futures.
reviews.review_text: Average infrastructure. Good building and impressive design. There’s a big ground and basketball court, but they are of no use. Students have tried to convince the physical training teacher to play in their free time and during free lectures, but they are told to get permission from the HOD. It was a terrible decision to take admission in that college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with the best education but not placements.
reviews.review_text: One thing I most liked about my college is the infrastructure. The infrastructure of the college is very good and good-looking; you will surely like it, and all campus is Wi-Fi enabled and AC is available for all the classes. Many other facilities are also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with great course curriculum .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is also good in my college and facilities like AC and Wi-Fi are at every corner of it. 
The food quality in college is good and very affordable.
Sports facilities are available in college and events are also organized in my college .

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good mentors and teachers .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is also good in my college and facilities like AC and Wi-Fi are also available at every corner of my college. 
Mess food quality is good at a reasonable level. 
Sports and games facilities in my college are very good and medical facilities in my college are also available .

reviews.review_heading: Good college with great crowd and good teaching quality.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is also good in my college; Wi-Fi-enabled classes and labs are their in college and library and classes are also air-conditioned. 
The food quality in college is good at reasonable levels 
Games and cricket tournaments are also organized at my college .

reviews.review_heading: Good college with very reasonable fees for engineering .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is also good in my college and the faculty has good computer labs.
AC is also available in classes and the library. 
Mess food quality in college is good and the cost of mess is very affordable. 
The medical facilities in college is very good .

reviews.review_heading: A good college can make students future-ready.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good at all campuses; it is green and airy, with different blocks for different engineering departments. Facilities like Wi-Fi are good on campus, with high-speed internet, and labs and classrooms are fully AC. Hostel faculty members are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with average placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in this college is decent. There are a few blocks and departments, and the 1st-year department is just awesome with the best view from the class and facilities like Wi-Fi are not working everywhere. Labs in the college are just average as well.

reviews.review_heading: Decent private college for engineering.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure in this college is good at all; there are ample numbers of blocks and buildings in the college but inside the college, it looks like a factor. The outside is beautiful; everyone should be attracted. 
The facilities in college are just as average. Wi-Fi is not working properly.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good and the infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available for the course are very premium and well organized. The labs are well organized and the speed of the Wi-Fi is very fast. The hostel is very neat, clean and well organized. The food in the mess is very delicious, just like in a 5-star hotel.

AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

review_content.Placements: 15% of Students were placed from our college. The package offered is below 2 LPA. The roles offered were Business Development & Technical roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure was good and it's a small institute named Sahyog College Thane. Labs are available but many times there is an electricity issue. No Wi-Fi is available for students and there is also a network issue. Other facilities like a library, hostel, canteen, medical, games and sports are not available. Although, an annual gathering and annual sports competition are organized.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This should be a last option in case a student doesn't get a good college.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, only 1 student got placed that too with a package of 2.5 LPA. If we look at the overall placements, they are very poor. The college doesn't have enough contacts and companies to get students placed. Also, the courses are not at all related to the industry demands.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is decent. All that it lacks is a canteen or a food court which a university campus must have. It also has very less sports facilities and co-curricular activities. The college is located far away from the city so transportation is also a problem.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: There are good placements after Covid for only one year. After that, it's not good for placement.

review_content.Placements: 45% is needed to apply for this degree at C.V. Raman University, Madhya Pradesh. The lowest package is 1.2 LPA, while the highest is 3 to 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Team Computers and other local companies; it's changed in years. Networking, software developers, web developers, etc. are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have AC in classroom projector and laptop for studying this course and college timing is 10 to 5. Facilities quality is good. There is no Wi-Fi for students but you can connect the PC and laptop from an Ethernet wire and we can take online lectures as well.

review_summary.college_name: Dr. C.V. Raman University, Madhya Pradesh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college. It is also a top-ranking techno park college.

content.Placements: My batchmates are really good and every one of them is goal-oriented. I like my classmates. I do not know the highest package offered in my college. I saw one-time on a board that a student got a package of 10 LPA after the BCA course. Companies like Tata Autocomp, Paytm, ICICI Bank, etc., hire students. Many students got internships, but not in any particular company. Some students are doing internships in Germany. A web developer role is offered for students.
content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities. In our college, there are Wi-Fi, a library, labs, etc. Everything is very good. We do not have a hostel in our college. We have one canteen in our college, and it is okay, but not good. Sports and game facilities are really good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dr. C.V. Raman University, Madhya Pradesh is not good.

content.Placements: 15% of Students were placed from our college. The package offered is below 2 LPA. The roles offered were Business Development & Technical roles.
content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure was good and it's a small institute named Sahyog College Thane. Labs are available but many times there is an electricity issue. No Wi-Fi is available for students and there is also a network issue. Other facilities like a library, hostel, canteen, medical, games and sports are not available. Although, an annual gathering and annual sports competition are organized.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This should be a last option in case a student doesn't get a good college.

content.Placements: In our batch, only 1 student got placed that too with a package of 2.5 LPA. If we look at the overall placements, they are very poor. The college doesn't have enough contacts and companies to get students placed. Also, the courses are not at all related to the industry demands.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is decent. All that it lacks is a canteen or a food court which a university campus must have. It also has very less sports facilities and co-curricular activities. The college is located far away from the city so transportation is also a problem.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: There are good placements after Covid for only one year. After that, it's not good for placement.

content.Placements: 45% is needed to apply for this degree at C.V. Raman University, Madhya Pradesh. The lowest package is 1.2 LPA, while the highest is 3 to 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Team Computers and other local companies; it's changed in years. Networking, software developers, web developers, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: They have AC in classroom projector and laptop for studying this course and college timing is 10 to 5. Facilities quality is good. There is no Wi-Fi for students but you can connect the PC and laptop from an Ethernet wire and we can take online lectures as well.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is just good.

content.Placements: At least 60% to 70% of students were placed. The highest package offered is Rs 16 and the lowest is Rs 2.5.
content.Infrastructure: All labs, classrooms, and libraries are available for our course. The overall quality is average. Sports facilities are not available, nor are food facilities, which I would like to see in our college.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good. Not very difficult and passed parentage 30% of all exams are the easiest, and practical and vivas are also easy.

review_content.Placements: The placement of this college is good, and my seniors got good package and position. Till date, the average placement is 40%. The highest package from this college is 22.5 lacs per annum, and the minimum is 2.5 lacs per year. The various high-rated companies visit the campus for hiring the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The whole campus is enabled with the Wi-Fi facility. All kinds of labs for engineering are available here. All the classrooms are fully A/C. The library has all kinds of important books for the students. Here, the playground is available for the outdoor games, and there is also an indoor complex. The hostel rooms are hygienic, and A/C or non-A/C rooms are available in the hostel. The canteen is available, and the quality of food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities. Not totally satisfied.

review_content.Placements: The placements are fine, not as much as expected, not so good. 30% students were placed. Salaries are not being disclosed but the estimated highest salary is 20K, the lowest is 7k, and the average salary is 10k-15k. Not many companies have visited, just some local companies and HCL, Infowiz, TATA, etc. Depending upon the knowledge, the students were hired mainly as trainees or as assistants in respective fields. Approximately 5% - 10% students got an internship from the college. I'm not sure about how much stipend was offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are facilitated with AC. Wi-Fi is also available throughout the whole building but not on the whole campus. A library is well equipped with lots of respective field books and AC. The whole campus is equipped with AC. Sports facilities are provided from time to time. Medical facilities are also available. The labs and classrooms are well built and the quality is good. The quality of food available in the canteen is quite good, but still not so satisfactory. The hostel rooms are good but not excellent.

review_summary.college_name: Mathuradevi Group of Institutes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: No one should take admission to this college otherwise your life will be ruined.

content.Placements: This college was very bad in terms of placements. They did not get any placements done from my batch. When asked they said that covid was going on so from where should they bring a company. Earlier I had made many big promises but later I did not give any placements.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel in this college. There were many courses but it was a bad college just in name This college was running just for the name sake. Even faculty members were upset, they did not get salary, and what else should I say, no matter how bad you say it was less.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Definitely, everything is good here.

content.Placements: Our college places students by providing them with campus internships. The placement hiring is direct and we have a placement committee that sends students for internships. About 60% of students get placed through our college. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. Top companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc., visit the college for placements. We can expect more high salary packages outside, and it depends on skill in the pharma field. If we have experience of 2-3 years or get internships, then we can expect a salary package that ranges from 10-13 LPA. Top roles in our course we can open our own factor, quality assurance, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 20% to 40% of students get placed in our college. The average salary package offered is 1.5 LPA, the highest salary package is 2.6 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 1.3 LPA. Cipla and SunPharma are the top recruiting companies in our college. Around 52% of students got internships in our course. The roles offered are employees and assistant managers.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college are a library, projector rooms, labs, etc. Hostel is not available. Canteen and medical facilities are good. Sports are very good. It has a cricket ground, basketball ground, badminton court, and tennis court.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college because of the behaviour of staff members and other things.

content.Placements: From finance specialisation, banks hire us directly after a successful interview. Companies visit our college for campus placements. Our faculty members trained us for the interview and shortlisted us because the aim of every student in our college is to get placements.
content.Infrastructure: There are good housing facilities, and they secure things. Mathuradevi Group of Institutes is a big group which includes its small institutions such as MDIM, MDITM and MDIP. Some of the teachers here are good because they behave well with every student.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Mathuradevi is good college.

content.Placements: There are no placements on the campus as they are very less. A person has to find a job by their skills and talent. The college faculty members are supportive, and they help to find the job in a certain locality. They made the industrial training on the major and minor projects, and they assist the placement from other offices.
content.Infrastructure: The college is in the outskirts, so locality looks like farms everywhere. The buildings are enough good looking and have many classrooms. The laboratory is good. The computer labs need to be improved well. The library is well-maintained. Many improvements are going on in the college.

Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.
